commands.review_summary:
The PR suppresses leading cron control-diagnostic reply text before direct channel delivery and adds token and cron delivery regression tests.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +74. Total +96 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible, not live-reproduced: construct a cron direct delivery result whose synthesized text starts with one of the diagnostic tokens, and current main keeps that text deliverable because only `NO_REPLY`-style silent tokens are suppressed.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof before merge; automation cannot supply that evidence for the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(cron): suppress control diagnostics in delivery
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat leading cron control diagnostics like `NO_SUBPROCESS_STARTED` and `NO_REQUIRED_TOOL_AVAILABLE` as non-deliverable control replies.
- Suppress those diagnostics before direct Matrix/channel delivery while preserving ordinary explanatory text that merely mentions the token.
- Add focused regression coverage for text delivery, structured delivery, and helper-token matching.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.cron.config.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/delivery-dispatch.double-announce.test.ts` — 71 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts src/auto-reply/tokens.test.ts` — 30 passed
- `pnpm -s tsgo:core:test`
- `pnpm -s lint:core`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: bdjben
